note: Created memory_zeroization_after_wgdevice_drop.rs with 5 tests: private_key_memory_zeroed_after_drop, preshared_key_memory_zeroed_after_drop, session_key_memory_zeroed_after_drop, all_key_fields_memory_zeroed_after_drop, no_residual_key_bytes_in_memory. All tests use raw pointer snapshots to verify actual memory bytes are zeroed after WgDevice drop.
